use_cases: Hero sections requiring interactive typography that responds to user hover
Landing pages needing engaging text animations to capture attention
Portfolio or creative websites featuring distinctive character-level hover effects
ai_summary: BubbleText is an interactive typography component that creates a cascading hover effect across individual characters. When hovering over a letter, that character and its neighbors animate with changing font weights and colors based on distance from the hovered index, creating a ripple-like visual effect. Built with React hooks for state management and Tailwind CSS for styling.
